props.name: current
props.description: When true, indicates this is the currently active menu item.

props.name: divider
props.description: When true, displays a divider line above this menu item.

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon displayed before the menu item label.

props.name: label
props.description: The text label displayed for the menu item.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: url
props.description: The URL the menu item links to. When absent, renders as a button instead of a link.

slots.name: popoverContent
slots.description: Content rendered inside the popover panel attached to this menu item.

slots.name: trailingContent
slots.description: Content rendered after the label in the trailing area of the menu item.
